nasb.text: He said to his servant, “Go up now, look toward the sea.” So he went up and looked and said, “There is nothing.” And he said, “Go back” seven times.

esv.text: And he said to his servant, “Go up now, look toward the sea.” And he went up and looked and said, “There is nothing.” And he said, “Go again,” seven times.

cnv.text: 以利亞對自己的僕人說：“你上去向海那邊觀看。”他就上去觀看，說：“甚麼也沒有。”以利亞說：“你再回去觀看。”這樣說了七次。

ccb.text: 他吩咐仆人：“你去向海的方向观看。”仆人就去观看，然后说：“什么也没有。”以利亚又让他去观看，前后共七次。
